productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Grey & Olive Printed Dress
description: Style Note This grey and olive green dress, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this fabulous dress. Style this with understated accessories and heeled shoes. Product Details Grey and olive green dress that has a boat neck, short raglan sleeves, cut out design on the sleeves, a sash at the waist with loops and a zipped back Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
